policy: compressed_size_bytes must be <= baseline.compressed_size_bytes per entry in regression_set. Any Track-B (codec adaptivity) commit that regresses ANY entry fails the cr_regression test. To intentionally bump a baseline (e.g. wire-format change with verified larger output), update this file in the same commit and justify in the message.

stretch_targets.name: bonn_all_synth_1ch
stretch_targets.notes: Sriraam 2012 methodology: ref = n_samples * 12 bits = 3,072,750 bytes. Stretch goal -- not a regression gate until Track A ingest lands an ASCII Bonn fixture under specs/conformance/ascii_vectors/.

notes: Conformance vectors basic_4ch_1024s_250hz.edf and single_sample_1ch.edf fail encoder validation (separate bug: phys_dim 'uV' rejected, EDF-too-short hard error). Tracked under audit-registry / EDF reader hardening. Re-add to regression set when those gates relax.
Bonn stretch target is tracked but not gating until Track A lands a checked-in ASCII fixture + ingest pipeline. See ADR 0023.
